synopsis:
Fourth issue from Marvel Comics Doctor Aphra (2025) Series
THE DOCTOR & THE WOOKIEE!
After months in the New Republic's service against her will, DOCTOR APHRA and CHEWBACCA are tasked with providing security for a vital diplomatic mission on a remote desert kingdom! But a connection from the past threatens to upend the whole event! Who is the mystery saboteur, and will they successfully foil Aphra's operation?
title: Doctor Aphra (2025): Chaos Agent #04
